name: FrameFlow
description: Scaffold parts of an existing protein with newly designed structures, given a pdb structure. Generate de-novo protein backbones. Want to test a large number of potential designs? Get in touch at info@tamarind.bio.
capabilities: Scaffold parts of an existing protein with newly designed structures, given a pdb structure
Want to test a large number of potential designs? Get in touch at info@tamarind.bio

pdbFile.description: Input PDB structure for motif scaffolding. Optional for de novo backbone generation.

motifResidues.description: Residue positions of the motif to scaffold

scaffoldLength.description: Length or length range of the designed scaffold

numDesigns.description: Number of backbone designs to generate
